chat.title: Duckie AI Assistant
chat.installBody: Quilt downloads a small local model (~1.1 GB) so the assistant runs entirely on your machine - no API keys, no cloud calls.
chat.emptyHint: The assistant outputs a Quilt pipeline you can click to insert into the canvas.

properties.nothingSelectedDesc: Click a node on the canvas to edit its configuration, schema, and validation rules.
properties.genericComponent: Generic component. Add a note in the field above to describe what this node should do.
properties.autodetectHelp: Reads the file header and a sample of rows to infer types.
properties.declaredSchema: Declared schema - define the output columns explicitly.
properties.noIssues: No issues detected for this node.
properties.noIssuesDesc: Schema mismatches, missing required properties, and engine compatibility warnings will surface here.
properties.noSchemaDesc: Run schema autodetect (Schema tab) or connect an upstream node to see sample data here.
properties.noSampleDescHtml: Click Autodetect on the Schema tab to pull a sample, or run the pipeline to fill this in.

bottom.noProblemsDesc: Required properties, dangling edges, cycles, and execution errors surface here. Validation runs live as you edit the pipeline.
bottom.runningDesc: Executing the pipeline through the DuckDB engine.
bottom.noRunYetDesc: Press F5 or click Run to execute the pipeline. Logs, per-node row counts, and execution timings stream here.
bottom.consoleDesc: The execution log. Run a pipeline and each stage's status, row count, and timing - plus any errors - appears here.

node.needsConfig: Required fields missing - open the Basic tab to configure
